providers.action_required: Senior 1 owns infrastructure capacity contract failures and must preserve the host reserve.
Senior 2 owns database capacity contract failures and must preserve connection and recovery budgets.
Senior 3 owns runtime capacity contract failures; preserve truthful steady-state demand, hard ceilings, bounded queues/retries and PgBouncer pool demand.
Senior 4 owns telemetry and host-observability capacity contract failures.
